hero.label: Made for Gojiberry AI
hero.headline: I want to sell the GTM brain I wish I had as a BDR.
hero.subheadline: At Copygen.ai I spent hundreds of hours manually hunting for intent signals and crafting LinkedIn sequences by hand. Gojiberry AI is automating exactly that workflow, and I want to be on the team turning that product into revenue. The chance to sell a tool I genuinely would have used is not something I can scroll past.

whyCompany.title: Gojiberry owns the intent layer before competitors realize it matters
whyCompany.body: Tracking 10+ buying signals across LinkedIn and scoring prospects against an ideal customer profile is not a feature, it is a category wedge. Most SDR tools automate the send without solving the targeting problem first. Gojiberry is attacking the harder and more defensible part of the stack.

whyCompany.title: 100 customers in 60 days post-pivot is a signal worth betting on
whyCompany.body: Pierre-Eliott proved the team can identify when something is not working and rebuild fast enough for the market to respond immediately. Joining a YC P26 company at this exact moment, before the go-to-market motion is fully systematized, means the SDR hire has real leverage on how the playbook gets built. That is the kind of ground-floor opportunity that does not stay open long.

whyCompany.title: My BDR reps at Copygen map directly to what Gojiberry's customers need most
whyCompany.body: I built cold outreach sequences in HubSpot and LinkedIn Sales Navigator, helped close 15 to 20 paying clients, and felt every inefficiency in manual intent-hunting firsthand. At NextAfter I layered in B2B digital strategy, learning how messaging and positioning move buyers before a call ever happens. I can speak to Gojiberry's prospects as someone who lived the pain the product solves.

quote: I have been the person doing manually what Gojiberry automates, and I know exactly which part of that job kills pipeline momentum. I want to bring that firsthand credibility into every discovery call and help Pierre-Eliott's team turn a fast pivot into a lasting category leader.
